title: I successfully capitalized on this rally in HIMS. 100% gain. Thanks to the market and the right people
author: zarijn_paulo
selftext:
Timing is everything

Although I entered the market late, I managed to catch a nice rally

The plan for this account is to aim for an average growth of 100% per month meaning, hopefully, a twelvefold return by the end of this year

Within our trading circle, we engage in daily discussions covering various aspects of the stock market, sharing analyses of our profits and losses, as well as our trading strategies and underlying logic. We also discuss risk management and other pertinent information all of which has proven immensely helpful to me. Thanks to this support, I am now optimistic that I will be able to pay off my outstanding debts this year

If you are interested in joining our discussions whether to talk about risk management, trading strategies, or simply to share your own insights please feel free to send me a private message or leave a comment below. I will send you an invitation as soon as I see your message

I wish everyone rational trading and hope that you all generate even greater wealth!

comments.author: japicbens
comments.body: Id like to Join too bro appreciate it
